name: ai_supply_chain
thesis_frame: Chase the physical, hard-to-bypass chokepoints in the AI-accelerator supply chain; size by confidence; exit when the constraint eases.

literature_examples: chokepoint / bottleneck-graph literature cited in research/docs/LITERATURE.md

privacy_note: Aggregate-only. This pack ships the schema plus arm-level RESULTS as fixtures (admission counts, rates, and the recorded rejection-quality-audit precision) -- no per-card content, symbols, or held-book data. Per the release boundary (design doc Sec 6 / DISCLAIMER.md / ETHICS.md), the live engine, live positions, and broker/paid data stay private.
